label: Brainrot Zombie
quotes: You don't scroll reels… reels scroll YOU 😭
roasts: Bro your attention span is buffering at 144p 💀
You don't scroll reels… reels scroll YOU 😭
Your brain opened Instagram and never came back
Even goldfish are asking you for focus tips 🐟
poetry:
Your mind once sharp, now lost in the feed,
One more scroll… one more need.

Thoughts dissolve in endless streams,
You traded focus… for dopamine dreams.

label: Reels Warrior
quotes: Just 5 mins turns into a whole Netflix season
roasts: You fight brainrot daily… but lose in overtime 💀
“Just 5 mins” turns into a whole Netflix season
You open phone for work and end up in memes
Discipline left the chat long ago
poetry:
You walk the line of focus and fall,
One ping… one scroll… you lose it all.

Not fully lost, not fully free,
A mind divided endlessly.

label: Balanced Human
roasts: You got control… but reels still got you sometimes 👀
You touch grass but also scroll in it 🌱
poetry:
A steady mind with occasional drift,
Discipline strong, yet habits shift.

You bend, not break, in digital storm,
A balanced soul in modern form.

label: Sigma Focus God
quotes: You don't chase dopamine, dopamine chases you
roasts: You don't chase dopamine, dopamine chases you
You are what productivity gurus pretend to be
poetry:
In silence you build, in focus you rise,
No noise can shake your steady eyes.

Where others fall to fleeting spark,
You walk ahead… calm in the dark.
